content: Auth edge-badge dedup slice completed: user observed non-clickable JWT auth badges below Login/Checkout even though the same auth information was already on the connector. The auth overlay no longer emits node-level auth badges for edge.auth.token; auth token/issuer/validator/recipient stays on the clickable edge badge popup. Updated docs/aof/AUTH-EDGE-BADGE-DEDUP-QIF-CHECK-2026-07-12.md. Verification: npm test -- --run test/render.test.ts (56 passing); npx tsc --noEmit; npm test (235 passing); npm run build; in-app browser smoke on http://127.0.0.1:5173/ sample release-checkout with auth enabled found node auth badge count 0, edge auth badge count 3, all edge auth badges popup-triggered. Existing untracked reports/ remains untouched.
